title: Four schoolgirl rugby players set sights on playing for SWD
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Four girls from the Mossel...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Four girls from the Mossel Bay area are part of two rugby A groups, from which a selection will be made for the South Western District (SWD) U18 and U16 girls' rugby squads.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Four girls from the Mossel Bay area are part of two rugby A groups, from which a selection will be made for the South Western District (SWD) U18 and U16 girls' rugby squads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The three U18 girls played in Albertinia last week, at a regional rugby festival for girls.","html":"The three U18 girls played in Albertinia last week, at a regional rugby festival for girls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They were invited as part of the George regional team, says SA Rugby's Samuel Oktober, who is head coach at the Youth Training Centre (YTC) at SWD Rugby in George.","html":"They were invited as part of the George regional team, says SA Rugby's Samuel Oktober, who is head coach at the Youth Training Centre (YTC) at SWD Rugby in George."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Oktober said: \"The festival in Albertinia was a platform for talent identification for the coaches. The George regional team played against the Hessequa regional team.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The scores were:","html":"The scores were:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Regional U16: 65, Hessequa U16: 0 and George Regional U18: 75 and Hessequa U18: 5.","html":"George Regional U16: 65, Hessequa U16: 0 and George Regional U18: 75 and Hessequa U18: 5."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Training"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SWD Rugby community coach Stanley Kama, based in Mossel Bay, together with other coaches, has been training schoolgirls during sessions held at the Hillcrest Secon-dary School grounds.","html":"SWD Rugby community coach Stanley Kama, based in Mossel Bay, together with other coaches, has been training schoolgirls during sessions held at the Hillcrest Secon-dary School grounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The girls will play a friendly match next week.","html":"The girls will play a friendly match next week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The girls in the U18 A Group are Linothando Hlekiso and Lathitha Ntshwanti from Hillcrest Secondary School and Akeelah Mei from Great Brak River Secondary.","html":"The girls in the U18 A Group are Linothando Hlekiso and Lathitha Ntshwanti from Hillcrest Secondary School and Akeelah Mei from Great Brak River Secondary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A girl from Point High School, Elizka le Grange, was selected for the U16 A group.","html":"A girl from Point High School, Elizka le Grange, was selected for the U16 A group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The A groups were selected from trials held on 2 May in George.","html":"The A groups were selected from trials held on 2 May in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oktober said: \"We are still training and preparing the girls. The next training session will take place on 7 June.\"","html":"Oktober said: \"We are still training and preparing the girls. The next training session will take place on 7 June.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Selected"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The two SWD U16 and U18 squads of 23 players each will be selected from the two A groups, which each comprise 30 players.","html":"The two SWD U16 and U18 squads of 23 players each will be selected from the two A groups, which each comprise 30 players."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oktober, who works in conjunction with SWD Rugby, says SWD and SA Rugby are \"still busy in Mossel Bay, getting high schools to be fully involved in girls' rugby\".","html":"Oktober, who works in conjunction with SWD Rugby, says SWD and SA Rugby are \"still busy in Mossel Bay, getting high schools to be fully involved in girls' rugby\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"An interprovincial friendly match is planned and we will have a date for it soon,\" says Oktober.","html":"\"An interprovincial friendly match is planned and we will have a date for it soon,\" says Oktober."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The squads of 23 players will play at SA Rugby's National Youth Week at Jeppe High School in Johannesburg from 30 June to 4 July.","html":"The squads of 23 players will play at SA Rugby's National Youth Week at Jeppe High School in Johannesburg from 30 June to 4 July."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Four schoolgirl rugby players set sights on playing for SWD
